svg.title: Music recommender data flow diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how user preferences flow through the scoring loop to produce ranked recommendations

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields does the UserProfile store and why?')
sendPrompt('How is songs.csv loaded and what gets parsed?')
sendPrompt('Explain the weighted scoring algorithm in detail')
sendPrompt('What does the raw score number represent?')
sendPrompt('How does the sort-descending ranking step work?')
sendPrompt('How do we decide how many songs to return?')
sendPrompt('What does the final recommendation output look like?')
